title: MultiAgentRuntime
description: Manifest format for agentruntimes/v1 — a composable multi-agent execution kernel. See AIP-48.

id.description: Unique slug for this runtime within its scope. Lower-kebab.

lifecycle.description: Advisory flags — whether the runtime's lifecycle hooks should fire. Adapter implementations decide what onTurnEnd / onMention / onIdle actually do.

id.description: Stable id used in mentions and self-skip. Lower-kebab + underscore.

executor.description: Key into the runtime's adapter registry. Examples: 'agent-cli', 'db-operator', 'inline'.

displayName.description: Human name. The mention dispatcher matches @<displayName> exactly (case-sensitive substring) and falls back to first-word matching for multi-word names.

role.description: Path to an AIP-47 ROLE.md (preferred) or inline role text. Paths resolve relative to the manifest directory.

meta.description: Adapter-specific extras — operator id, runtime ref slug, capability tags.

kind.description: Adapter kind. The runtime registry resolves this to an implementation.

AdapterConfig.description: Adapter configuration block. Schema is open by design — each adapter validates its own additional fields.

tools.description: Tool names this participant may invoke at execution time.

mcpServers.description: Optional list of MCP server ids whose tools are available to this participant.
